title: Update: Algo strategy is much more healthier
author: RemoraEdge
selftext:
My previous post did not include commission or slippage. When added both of them it drastically changed the results I was getting. This led to me scrutinizing everything, and I realized it was missing some core pieces to have it see and take trades the way it is suppose to. I realized it was taking some wrong trades and missing trades it should be. So I broke it down again and rebuilt it with the missing pieces. And now it is stronger than ever. Below results are where I am at currently which includes commission and slippage. There is still alot more to do. I'm not sure improving it will ever stop. but still need to look more at SL and TP placements, trade management, holding runners. cutting trades early. And I still have a roadmap of ideas I need to test, and a list of areas I need to audit thoroughly. 

This Algo is not a pattern recognition Algo where I merely plotting 4 step system and let it go. This is a decision making algo that considers many different factors. I can hold multiple playbooks and choose between when depending on what price does. It considers regime and market conditions so it can adapt and flourish under any conditions (the missing piece for most algos) it knows hen to push runners. it knows when to be patient. It only trades After 10:00am and ends at 3:00pm. it does not trade the NY open. it is consistent and reliable. I do want to increase the trade count without depreciating my win rate, but I will do it more carefully. Im aiming for 2-3 trades a a day at least. 

The winners are bigger than losers since nearly all my trades have mutiple TPs/runners. the Win rate is high because i take my first partial fairly early around 1:1. 

if you have any questions or comments. feel free to ask. but No I'm not sharing this with you because this is a combination of my over 10 years of trading experience that I was finally able to put together with the help of AI.
